the first novel took alex 4 days to finish and contained 120 pages the second novel was longer with 180 pages and took alex 6 days to complete the third novel was the longest with 240 pages and it took alex 8 days to finish if alex read the same number of pages each day for each novel the total number of pages alex read per day on average across all three novels is calculated by adding the total pages and dividing by the total days the total pages is 120 + 180 + 240 = 540 the total days is 4 + 6 + 8 = 18 the average pages per day is 540 / 18 = 30 pages per day the first novel had 120 pages over 4 days so 30 pages per day the second novel had 180 pages over 6 days so 30 pages per day the third novel had 240 pages over 8 days so 30 pages per day the average pages per day on average across all three novels is 30 pages per day the first novel had 120 pages over 4 days so 30 pages per day the second novel had 180 pages over 6 days so 30 pages per day the third novel had 240 pages over 8 days so 30 pages per day the average pages per day on average across all three novels is 30 pages per day the first novel had 120 pages over 4 days so 30 pages per day the second novel had 180 pages over 6 days so 30 pages per day the third novel had 240 pages over 8 days so 30 pages per day the average pages per day on average across all three novels is 30 pages per day the first novel had 120 pages over 4 days so 30 pages per day the second novel had 180 pages over 6 days so 30 pages per day the third novel had 240 pages over 8 days so 30 pages per day the average pages per day on average across all three novels is 30 pages per day the first novel had 120 pages over 4 days so 30 pages per day the second novel had 180 pages over 6 days so 30 pages per day
